steps.speaker: Haku
steps.text: ...You spared me. My master is gone. A tool with no purpose should simply break...

steps.speaker: Naruto
steps.text: You're not a tool! Come with us. Find something — someone — worth protecting. For real this time.

steps.speaker: Haku
steps.text: ...Then I will walk your path, Commander. My ice is yours.

steps.speaker: Kakashi
steps.text: Yo. Good work, all of you. Let's head home — the Chunin Exams are coming, and Team 7 is ready for them now.
